heading: But there are things that still need to be resolved

insights.title: Club Partner Network
insights.text: How the Club Partner Network works in practice, including how many clubs each partner is responsible for, how they connect to national service lines, and what capability and recruitment looks like.

insights.title: Shared Services
insights.text: Where the shared services boundary sits, recognising that clubs have different needs and capabilities, and how the system needs to flex for the diverse clubs across the movement.

insights.title: National Service Lines
insights.text: How national service lines are coordinated and what consistent specialist support looks like regardless of location.

insights.title: Regional Structure
insights.text: What the regional structure looks like under the hybrid model.
